usernameMustNotConsistSigns: The username must not contain spaces and the characters @ # $ % ^ & * !.
usernameLengthOutOfRange: Username length is out of range min: {min}, max: {max}
passwordLengthOutOfRange: Password length is out of range min: {min}, max: {max}
passwordNotMatchRegexp: Make sure the password: 1)Contains at least one digit or one non-alphanumeric character, 2)Does not start with a dot or a newline character, 3) Contains at least one uppercase letter, 4) Contains at least one lowercase letter.

product.mainImageUrlIsNotAString: Main image url is not a string
